creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text: For my one port that uses p7zip (emulators/higan), I was using it only for extracting the DISTFILE, what do I need to do in this case? I'm using it via USES=7z:p7zip and I don't currently see an alternative (I used p7zip if I recall right because bsdtar did not handle the file properly) or a way to use archivers/7-zip in its place via that USES.
